Internal Legal Memo — Huaxing Lattice Semiconductors Co., Ltd. (issuer candidate, SSE STAR Market) — 2026-05-30
To: Board Compliance Committee; From: General Counsel, Mr. Liang Qiu; Re: PIPL/CSL/DSL alignment and MNPI controls in pre-IPO workflows
Company USCC: 92310000MA0X1Y2Z3A; registered address: 19F, Tower C, No. 88 Qimei Rd, Pudong South District, Shanghai 209999
Contact for this memo: legal@huaxing-lattice.cn, tel +86-21-6600-4398; public helpline 12345 is referenced only for public policy questions and is not our contact
Employee onboarding currently captures Resident ID numbers and passport data for PRC nationals and foreign hires; e.g., Resident ID 11010519880612345X (checksum invalid) and Passport P<CN>9 8 7 6 5 4 3 shown in a redacted sample
One intern, Ms. Tao Yiran, is 13 years old; note this is sensitive personal information under PIPL and requires parental consent workflow
Finance shares a salary disbursement account: Acct 6222-1379-0043-2107 held at Jade Banyan Bank, and payroll email payroll@huaxing-lattice.cn; do not treat the phrase Name: __________ as data
We also store mobile numbers for field engineers (e.g., 1 39 1 00 8 77 23 broken across digits) and office extensions, but we do not collect MAC addresses or IMEI
Cross-border: vendor BrightCloud HK Ltd. will receive HR contact lists; per CAC measures we must file a security assessment before exporting employee phone/email and household registration info (hukou), via https://intra.huaxing-lattice.cn/cac/submit?rid=11010519880612345X
As issuer under CSRC supervision and potential Shanghai Stock Exchange STAR Market listing, the 2026H1 revenue numbers and non-public customer pipeline remain inside information until disclosed in our prospectus
MNPI transmission is limited to role-only recipients: the Manager, Chief Accountant, and external counsel at sunriver-legal.cn; do not forward to generic mailers like info@ or service@
Tax filings include a dummy local tax ID 91350000MAB12C34D (invalid) used only in sandbox with the SZ Tax Bureau test portal; for avoidance of doubt, this string is not a live taxpayer
For onshore data residency under CSL/DSL, production databases remain in Ningxia zone A; jira task ops-privacy-143 tracks the DPIA; this memo contains no purchase order numbers or marketing opt-ins
